rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF JAMES YATES
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. 1) The petition requests payment of fees and costs of the conservator and her attorney in the total amount of $114,129.87, less $10,440 already paid to the conservator as fees on account, consisting of: (a) $29,309 in fees for services of the conservator of person, less fees on account already paid during one-year account period; (b) $40,880.50 in fees for services of the conservator of estate; (c) $397.12 in costs to the conservator for mileage, bridge tolls, and parking; (d) $42,990 in fees for services of the conservator's attorney; and (e) $553.25 in costs to the conservator's attorney. 2) The conservator requests authority to pay, as fees on account, $175 per hour for her services as conservator of the person up to 8 hours per month, and $155 per hour for her services as conservator of the estate up to 8 hours per month, on and after January 1, 2022. 3) No proof of service showing notice of the objections filed by the conservatee's spouse has been given to the conservator's surety is on file. The attorney for the conservatee's spouse was informed of the notice issue via e-mail on 08/18/2021. The tentative ruling for the 10/26/2021 hearing also raised the lack of notice of the objections to the surety as an issue, but nothing has been filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 875 8017 7925 and password 722809. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and key in meeting ID "875 8017 7925#", then participant ID "0#", then password "722809#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appear by video and that they input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review the Court's 10th Amended General Order which took effect on 06/28/2021 for more information.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF SAMUEL V. CHONG
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Determine Heirship (Probate Code Section 11700) And For Order To Increase Bond
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/11/2022. 1) Examiner still does not have the required courtesy copy of the 09/03/2021 Declaration. Once the declaration is received it will be reviewed and there may be other issues. Endorsed-filed single sided courtesy copies are required for any papers filed with the court and must be received by Examiner in room 202 at the Superior Court. Examiners will not review any document until after it has been filed and a courtesy copy has been received. [LRSF 2.7, 14.7]. Courtesy copies dropped off without a hearing date or examiner name on the envelope or a cover page, will be processed by the clerks as time allows and may cause delays. 2) Please explain the the difference is last names on material side for Teresita V. Chong, Leticia J. Gonzalez, Elvira J. Guinto, Josephine Santos, Anges J. Ico. 3) Please file evidence tracing Michael Angelo Sants to Josephine Santos. 4) Please file and explain the Josephine Santos written instrument and provde the legal authority in support. An endorsed-filed single sided hard copy of all documents filed in response to these notes, as well as any other documents required must be received by this Examiner in room 202 no later than 4 pm on 12/27/2021 [LRSF 14.7 B.] Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Rulings: continued to 1/18/22. new notice is required. the notice filed 11/15/21 is not sufficient as it is missing the information in section 3 - identification of the property at issue in the petition. in addition, notice was mailed 11/15/21 for a hearing on 12/7/21, less than the 30 days required. there is no POS on Wells Fargo Bank, the holder of the account, and no one appointed to represent the estate Daniel. the new POS showing 30 days notice of the continued hearing date and properly filled out NOH must be on file by noon 1/10/22. in addition, by that same time and date, a file stamped copy of the amended petition and proposed order must be delivered to the examiner in Room 202. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YUKIKO ALTMAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal
rulings.Rulings: Hearing appearance required. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible. Please review the 10th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their first and last name and case number. ISSUES (may be addressed at hearing): 1) Administrator has not filed the Inventory and Appraisal.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE TREVOR KNOOP FIRST PARTY SPECIAL NEEDS TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition To Establish Special Needs Trust And Approve Attorney Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: continued to 1/11/22. date chosen by the examiner as no response from counsel. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WOON FUNG CHAN REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Instructions And Confirming Trust Asset
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/12/22. (No earlier availability.) No timely response to issues posted in the tentative ruling for the hearing on 11/2/21. In addition, the proof of service filed for the original petition (which, in any event, was superseded by the amended petition) was for the wrong form of notice of hearing; 850 petitions require the Judicial Council form DE-115. Courtesy copies must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/3/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF NANCY BOYKIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO DETERMINE SUCCESSION TO REAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 1/18/22. no amended petition filed yet. if nothing is filed by noon on 1/10/22, an appearance will be required for the court to determine whether to allow this petition to remain on calendar. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE WILLIAM AND SONIA MARTIN INTER VIVOS TRUST, DATED OCTOBER 19, 2000
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Certain Assets Are Trust Property (Probate Code Section 850 (A)(3)(B)
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/12/22. Issue(s) necessitating continuance: The wrong form of notice was mailed: DE-120 instead of DE-115. Courtesy copies of any papers filed to address these issues must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 1/3/22. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF FOOK LAI
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 1/11/22. the examiner notes a declaration in the efiling queue with a copy of the apostile, but the original or a certified copy of that document must be filed in person, it cannot be efiled. deadline for in person filing of the original apostile or certified copy is noon on 1/4/22. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JAMES DONALD CHURCH
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: continued to 12/21/21 for declaration and notice to contingent trust beneficiary. POS and declaration to be filed by noon on 12/14/21 showing full 15 days notice.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF LEE B. GOMES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/4/2022. 1) An amended pleading or an amendment to a pleading requires the same notice of hearing (including publication) as the pleading it amends. [CRC 7.53] 2) A copy of the will is not attached to the amended petition. See petition page 2 #3f(2). Examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10 B.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF JOHN H. KNIEF
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: continued to 1/4/22 (first available date). the declaration is not yet filed, but it appears additional information is needed, as the family tree does not include the decedent's father and mother, so it is not clear whether both maternal and paternal heirs are listed. please state the names and dates of death of the parents, and which aunts and/or uncles are related to which parent. please note, examiner continuances are final, not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF MARILYN ANN JANES
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/28/21. (No earlier availability.) Issues necessitating continuance: No courtesy copies. No proposed order. [LRSF 2.7 B., 14.7, and 14.60 E.] No proof of publication. As a one-time courtesy, some of the documents were skimmed online. The Acknowledgment of Receipt of the Duties and Liabilities is incomplete at item 2 (no telephone number). All courtesy copies and a proposed order must be received by the assigned Examiner by no later than 12/17/21. Examiner continuances are final and not subject to contest under LRSF 14.10.B.
